rule_templates.title: Block PO Box Addresses
rule_templates.description: Prevents shipping to PO Box addresses by checking the address lines for PO Box indicators, ensuring orders are sent to physical locations suitable for standard carrier deliveries.
rule_templates.error_message: We cannot ship to PO Box addresses. Please provide a physical shipping address.

rule_templates.title: B2B Only Checkout
rule_templates.description: Restricts checkout access to recognized business accounts with an active company profile. Guest accounts and standard consumer checkout profiles will be blocked.
rule_templates.error_message: Checkout is restricted to B2B customers only.

rule_templates.title: Login Required to Checkout
rule_templates.description: Enforces user authentication before proceeding. Unauthenticated guest checkouts are blocked, prompting customers to log in or register an account.
rule_templates.error_message: Please log in to your account to complete checkout.

rule_templates.title: Restricted States
rule_templates.description: Blocks checkout for specific state or province codes (e.g. Alaska, Hawaii, or military zones) where shipping is unsupported or incurs excessive carrier rates.
rule_templates.error_message: We currently do not ship to Alaska or Hawaii.

rule_templates.title: Block Specific Countries
rule_templates.description: Restricts checkout access for specific countries or regions to comply with trade sanctions, high-risk fraud zones, or regions outside your shipping carrier networks.
rule_templates.error_message: We do not ship to the selected country.

rule_templates.title: Hazardous Items Shipping Restriction
rule_templates.description: Ensures hazardous or safety-restricted products are not shipped to islands, remote territories, or specific state codes where air transport regulations prohibit them.
rule_templates.error_message: Hazardous items cannot be shipped to Alaska, Hawaii, or Puerto Rico.

rule_templates.title: Minimum Order Value limit
rule_templates.description: Enforces a minimum cart subtotal requirement before allowing checkout, helping cover operational costs and logistics margins for small orders.
rule_templates.error_message: The minimum order value to checkout is $50.00.

rule_templates.title: Maximum Order Value limit
rule_templates.description: Sets an upper threshold limit on the order subtotal to reduce liability risks, prevent high-value fraud, or redirect bulk trade orders to direct sales representatives.
rule_templates.error_message: Orders exceeding $1,000.00 must be placed by phone or email.

rule_templates.title: Limit Customer Age (18+)
rule_templates.description: Blocks checkout if the customer's age on file is under 18, ensuring legal compliance for age-restricted products like alcohol, tobacco, or mature content.
rule_templates.error_message: You must be 18 years or older to purchase these items.

rule_templates.title: Restrict Subscription Items
rule_templates.description: Restricts subscription products to authorized customers with specific tags (e.g., VIP, wholesale), preventing general public signups for exclusive recurring plans.
rule_templates.error_message: Subscriptions are exclusive to VIP members.

rule_templates.title: Customer Tags Validation
rule_templates.description: Restricts order placement to customers possessing specific account tags (like VIP, Wholesale, or Member), protecting exclusive catalog collections.
rule_templates.error_message: This checkout is reserved for Wholesale or VIP customers only.

rule_templates.title: Guest Checkout Restriction
rule_templates.description: Blocks checkout access for guest accounts, ensuring all orders are linked to registered customer profiles for loyalty tracking and communication.
rule_templates.error_message: Guest checkout is disabled. Please create an account to purchase.

rule_templates.title: Block Specific ZIP Codes
rule_templates.description: Blocks shipping to specific ZIP/postal codes known for delivery failures, remote access surcharges, or where regional distributor exclusivity applies.
rule_templates.error_message: We do not offer shipping to your ZIP code.

rule_templates.title: Regex Address Format Validation
rule_templates.description: Validates the shipping address format against a regular expression pattern to prevent special characters, typos, or gibberish entries that cause shipment failures.
rule_templates.error_message: Please avoid special characters in your shipping address.

rule_templates.title: Restricted Collections Validation
rule_templates.description: Checks if cart items belong to restricted collection GIDs, blocking checkout for restricted product categories during shipping blackout periods or regional lockouts.
rule_templates.error_message: Items in your cart belong to a restricted collection and cannot be shipped.

rule_templates.title: Restricted Vendors Validation
rule_templates.description: Blocks purchase of items supplied by specific brand vendors, useful for enforcing distribution agreements, regional supply constraints, or seasonal inventory halts.
rule_templates.error_message: We cannot fulfill orders for products from this vendor.

rule_templates.title: Incompatible Product Combinations
rule_templates.description: Prevents incompatible items from being purchased in the same order (e.g., pre-order products mixed with in-stock items, or conflicting fragile/heavy items).
rule_templates.error_message: Incompatible items found in your cart. These products cannot be shipped together.

rule_templates.title: Cart Item Quantity Limit
rule_templates.description: Limits the maximum number of items (total item count) allowed in the cart to prevent bulk buying, retail arbitrage, or carrier parcel weight limit issues.
rule_templates.error_message: Maximum quantity of 10 items exceeded per order.

rule_templates.title: Weight Limit Restriction
rule_templates.description: Enforces a maximum threshold on the total cart weight, ensuring order shipments do not exceed standard parcel carrier limits or trigger unexpected freight shipping.
rule_templates.error_message: Order weight exceeds 50kg. Please contact us for a custom shipping quote.

rule_templates.title: SKU Quantity Limit Check
rule_templates.description: Restricts the number of unique SKUs (different products/variants) permitted in the cart to control inventory runs, limit order complexity, or manage pack times.
rule_templates.error_message: A maximum of 5 unique product SKUs can be purchased per order.
